description:
Replace storage-team based VersionDeterminationPhase with demux-based approach.

## Current State

VersionDeterminationPhase queries storage teams for their durable versions and calculates the minimum across quorum.

## New Approach

- Demux tracks lowest version safely stored in ObjectStorage
- Recovery uses: demux durable version → log quorum version
- The range between these is what needs to be replayed

## Recovery Version Determination

With m=2, n=3 logs:
- If log A died, B is at 100, C is at 105
- 100 is the highest reliable version (both B and C have it)
- Reconstruction of A needs mix of transactions from B and C

## Phases to Modify

- VersionDeterminationPhase: Query demux instead of storage teams
- LogRecoveryPlanningPhase: Already does log quorum calculation

## Key Files

- lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/version_determination_phase.ex
- lib/bedrock/control_plane/director/recovery/log_recovery_planning_phase.ex
title: Demux tracks durable versions for recovery version determination
